summary_en: Going-private (parent) disclosed for Ｇ－笑美面. Take-private transaction removes the float and resets capital policy.
summary_jp: Ｇ－笑美面に対する完全子会社化を開示。非公開化により資本政策が再構築。

summary_en: Ｇ－笑美面 authorised a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: Ｇ－笑美面が自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。
